validation.string_type: This field must be a string
validation.string_too_short: Must be at least {min_length} characters long
validation.string_too_long: Must be at most {max_length} characters long
validation.int_type: This field must be an integer
validation.int_parsing: This field must be a valid integer
validation.float_type: This field must be a number
validation.float_parsing: This field must be a valid number
validation.bool_type: This field must be a boolean
validation.bool_parsing: This field must be a valid boolean
validation.greater_than_equal: Must be greater than or equal to {ge}
validation.less_than_equal: Must be less than or equal to {le}
validation.list_type: This field must be an array
validation.dict_type: This field must be an object
validation.model_type: This field must be an object
validation.datetime_type: This field must be a datetime
